Video.summary: Bob paints a winding brook.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Meadow Brook Surprise

Video.summary: Bob paints snowy peaks and water.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Summit

Video.summary: Bob uses color to create realistic waters.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Emerald Waters

Video.summary: Bob uses blue tones to paint waves at night.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Oval Essence

Video.summary: Bob Ross demonstrates how to create a mountain landscape illuminated by the moonlight; using careful brushstrokes, Bob brings this peaceful vista to life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Moonlight Oval

Video.summary: Bob paints a winter fantasy land.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Snowy Solitude

Video.summary: Firs front rugged peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Exhibition

Video.summary: Bob paints a rustic mill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: The Old Mill

Video.summary: A simple abode stands alone in wintry woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Cabin Hideaway

Video.summary: Bob paints a mountain scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Distant Mountains

Video.summary: Greenery looms before distant mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Lost Lake

Video.summary: A cowboy restin' by the vibrant golden red glow of the cracklin' flames.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Campfire

Video.summary: The stillness of a cold darkness is captured as a cozy little cabin rests atop a snow covered hill.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Winter Night

Video.summary: Bob paints a home on a cliff.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Deep Wilderness Home

Video.summary: Far, far away there rests a mountain nestled in misty clouds and foothills.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Distant Hills

Video.summary: Bob paints a quaint winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Frosty Winter Morn

Video.summary: Bob paints a secluded stream.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Country Creek

Video.summary: Bob creates illusions of depth and dimension.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Dimensions

Video.summary: Bob paints a cabin nestled in a valley.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Haven in the Valley

Video.summary: Bob paints a frosty winter scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Wintertime Blues

Video.summary: Bob paints a stormy lighthouse scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Night Light

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene with sun and shadows.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Sunlight in the Shadows

Video.summary: Bob paints a pastel seashore.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Pastel Seascape

Video.summary: Bob paints a lake and grassy mountains.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Mountain Ridge Lake

Video.summary: In the midst of the forest flows a stream that splashes and trickles endlessly along.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Bubbling Stream

Video.summary: Bob paints a golden autumn scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Reflections of Gold

Video.summary: Bob paints a hazy woods on black canvas.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Purple Haze

Video.summary: The sounds of quiet waters, the sight of velvety green shrubs and the hint of distance foothills in a perfect scene of relaxation.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Quiet Inlet

Video.summary: Bob paints a lush island.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Island Paradise

Video.summary: Bob paints a misty forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest Edge

Video.summary: Bob paints a scene of early winter.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Russet Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints a snow scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Splendor of a Snowy Winter

Video.summary: Bob paints flowers at sunrise.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Daisies at Dawn

Video.summary: Bob paints a peaceful, misty forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Silent Forest

Video.summary: An old worn-down farm building settles into soft golden grassy bushes and trees of autumn.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Rustic Barn

Video.summary: Bob paints a bridge in a forest.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Covered Bridge

Video.summary: Breathtaking skies, bending palms and waves that accentuate the cool night breeze.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Blue Moon

Video.summary: Bob paints sky, stream and snowy peaks.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Gray Mountain

Video.summary: Bob paints in warm hues.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Golden Glow of Morning

Video.summary: Bob paints a breathtaking scene.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: A Spectacular View

Video.summary: Bob paints a river in the woods.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
Video.title: Forest River

Video.summary: Bob paints a sunrise scene.

Video.title: Daybreak
